# RISMFP UI Redesign Demo

This repository contains an independent modern frontend redesign of the historical Raising Incomes of Small and Medium Farmers Project website.

## Status

- Independent portfolio and frontend demonstration
- Not an official Government of Nepal service
- Not operated by RISMFP
- Not operated or endorsed by the Asian Development Bank
- Historical content may be incomplete or outdated
- Do not submit credentials, personal data, financial data, or official records

## Technology

- Semantic static HTML
- Modern responsive CSS
- Native JavaScript and Web Components
- GitHub Pages hosting

Repository: https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/rismfp-ui
